---
author: Pranav
execute: 
    freeze: true
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: [serif,custom.scss]
        slide-number: true
        css: custom.css
        transition: slide
        transition-speed: default
        chalkboard: true
        margin: 0.1
---

# Parametric Study - All Cases - Wide Bounds

## Design Space for DoE

Density (1.23) = 0.2 to 3 g/cm^3^ 

Young's Modulus (3.605) = 1 to 10 MPa

Radius (2.43) = 1 to 5 mm

Twist in End Vector (0) = -180° to 180°

End Vector Deviation (0) = 0° to 10°

Sampled using LHS


## Position 1 - Case 1 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p1c1-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p1c1-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 1 - Case 2 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p1c2-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p1c2-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 1 - Case 3 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p1c3-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p1c3-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 2 - Case 1 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p2c1-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p2c1-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 2 - Case 2 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p2c2-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p2c2-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 2 - Case 3 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p2c3-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p2c3-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 3 - Case 1 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p3c1-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p3c1-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 3 - Case 2 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p3c2-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p3c2-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 3 - Case 3 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p3c3-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p3c3-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 4 - Case 1 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p4c1-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p4c1-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 4 - Case 2 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p4c2-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p4c2-doe-error >}}
:::
::::

## Position 4 - Case 3 {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p4c3-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#p4c3-doe-error >}}
:::
::::
